name: BeyondTrust
description: Monitor privileged access management, managed accounts, user groups, and managed systems in BeyondTrust Password Safe

credentialFields.label: BeyondTrust API Base URL
credentialFields.helpText: Full API base URL including path, e.g. https://your-server/BeyondTrust/api/public/v3

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: API Key from BeyondTrust API Registration (Configuration > General > API Registrations)

credentialFields.label: RunAs User
credentialFields.helpText: BeyondTrust RunAs user for API authentication (e.g. domain\username or local user)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all managed accounts in BeyondTrust Password Safe to verify privileged account inventory and access controls

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Lists user groups and roles in BeyondTrust to verify role-based access control configuration for privileged access

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Lists managed systems and vaults in BeyondTrust Password Safe to verify secure credential management across infrastructure
